payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped light beige rectangular fabric pillow with visible seam/piping and soft stuffed form, showing subtle horizontal shading and slight wrinkles; appears to be a close-up shot (approximately 0.5 m from the camera).
